entities.name: URD BEAN

entities.description: A viral pathogen that causes leaf crinkle symptoms in urd bean crops

entities.name: DHT

entities.name: INCIDENCE
entities.description: The frequency or occurrence of ULCV in the urd bean crop

entities.name: TRANSMISSION
entities.description: The process by which ULCV is spread to the urd bean plant

entities.name: INCUBATION PERIOD
entities.description: The time interval between the infection of the plant by ULCV and the appearance of symptoms

entities.name: DISEASE SPREAD
entities.description: The extent of ULCV propagation within the field
